description: Configure DNS records for Branch AI-powered email support. Adds SPF, DKIM, and MX records required by Resend for sending and receiving email on your domain.
variableDescription: %spfhost%: SPF/MX subdomain (e.g. send). %spfvalue%: SPF TXT record value. %mxvalue%: MX endpoint. %dkim1name%: DKIM key 1 name. %dkim1value%: DKIM key 1 value. %dkim2name%: DKIM key 2 name. %dkim2value%: DKIM key 2 value. %dkim3name%: DKIM key 3 name. %dkim3value%: DKIM key 3 value.
